name: Rea Sanka
description: After her zombification, her skin becomes almost entirely white and her purple eyes become crimson/blood red. She is described as 'very beautiful' by boys in Shiyou Boys High School. Placed diagonally on her belly is the long scar/gash that she sustained by the tree branch from the cliff-drop that killed her. She was accidentally pushed off a cliff by her father while trying to protect Babu, resulting in her death. She bears striking resemblances from her unnamed mother.
creator: Liam1-4-1
